summary: PracticeMenuPage now exposes standalone pure media tacit browse cards through a bundle-only menuView helper, without changing practice store/runtime/query/session/admin boundaries. menuView vitest 38/38 passed, npx tsc --noEmit passed, npm run build passed with only the pre-existing Vite chunk-size warning, npm run lint produced no new issues beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73, and the reported self-reviewer result was pass.
